title: 24 Skilling Dansk - Christian VI (Monogram type)

obverse.description: Crowned double King's monogram divides legend at sides.
obverse.lettering:
C6 6C
D • G • REX • DAN •  |  NORV • VAN • G •
obverse.lettering_translation: (Christian VI) Dei Gratia King of Denmark, Norway, the Wends and the Goths
obverse.picture_copyright: Leipziger Münzhandlung und Auktion Manfred Höhn

reverse.description: Crowned shield with arms of Denmark, Sweden and Norway above big cross divides date at sides and mintmark at bottom. Value as legend around rim.
reverse.lettering:
24 • SKILLING •   |   DANSKE • COUR: M •
17 41
C W
reverse.picture_copyright: Leipziger Münzhandlung und Auktion Manfred Höhn

comments:
Two main variants exists of this coin:
Type A - With reverse legend starting clockwise from right of the crown (only in 1732 date)
Type B - With reverse legend starting counterclockwise from lower left. (in coins from 1732 to 1743)
